examples: It was such an irresponsible enterprise that it added tripolycyanamide to its milk powder, which tragically led to many babies' developmental disorders and ruined many families' happiness.
Tragically, she never saw the completed building because she died before it was finished.
Tragically, for a few people every year, this results in injury or loss of life.
In fact, just recently, Amy Winehouse tragically passed away at the young age of 27.
